feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Ganjil Genap DKI Jakarta Kembali Berlaku - NEWS OR HOAX (Bag3)

link.title: Ganjil Genap DKI Jakarta Kembali Berlaku - NEWS OR HOAX (Bag3)

entry.content:
KOMPAS.TV - Aturan pembatasan kendaraan bermotor berdasarkan nomor pelat ganjil-genap kembali diberlakukan di DKI Jakarta sejak 10 agustus kemarin.
Aturan ini kembali diterapkan setelah sempat dicabut pada maret 2020 akibat pandemi covid-19 yang mengakibatkan ditetapkannya aturan pembatasan sosial berskala besar atau PSBB.
Aturan ganjil-genap ini akan kembali diterapkan di 25 titik ruas jalan dan 28 titik pintu tol di ibu kota.
Selain itu, saat ini pemerintah provinsi DKI Jakarta juga sedang mengkaji penerapan sistem ganjil-genap selama 24 jam penuh.
Tak hanya di 25 jalan, menurut rencana, aturan ini akan diterapkan pada semua ruas jalan.
Melalui kepala dinas perhubungan, DKI Jakarta, Syafrin Liputo, penerapan ganjil-genap sepanjang hari bisa saja dilakukan dengan mengacu pada peraturan gubernur 51 tahun 2020 mengenai pelaksanaan pembatasan sosial berskala besar pada masa transisi menuju masyarakat sehat, aman, dan produktif.
Wacana ganjil-genap 24 jam ini dikemukakan sebagai bentuk rem darurat pemprov DKI Jakarta untuk mengurangi pergerakan warga Jakarta dalam rangka mencegah penyebaran COVID-19.
Warga diharapkan hanya melakukan perjalanan penting dan mendesak, untuk menghindari penumpukan di pusat kegiatan atau keramaian.
entry.summary: KOMPAS.TV - Aturan pembatasan kendaraan bermotor berdasarkan nomor pelat ganjil-genap kembali diberlakukan di DKI Jakarta sejak 10 agustus kemarin. Aturan ini kembali diterapkan setelah sempat dicabut pada maret 2020 akibat pandemi covid-19 yang mengakibatkan ditetapkannya aturan pembatasan sosial berskala besar atau PSBB. Aturan ganjil-genap ini akan kembali diterapkan di 25 titik ruas jalan dan 28 titik pintu tol di ibu kota. Selain itu, saat ini pemerintah provinsi DKI Jakarta juga sedang mengkaji penerapan sistem ganjil-genap selama 24 jam penuh. Tak hanya di 25 jalan, menurut rencana, aturan ini akan diterapkan pada semua ruas jalan. Melalui kepala dinas perhubungan, DKI Jakarta, Syafrin Liputo, penerapan ganjil-genap sepanjang hari bisa saja dilakukan dengan mengacu pada peraturan gubernur 51 tahun 2020 mengenai pelaksanaan pembatasan sosial berskala besar pada masa transisi menuju masyarakat sehat, aman, dan produktif. Wacana ganjil-genap 24 jam ini dikemukakan sebagai bentuk rem darurat pemprov DKI Jakarta untuk mengurangi pergerakan warga Jakarta dalam rangka mencegah penyebaran COVID-19. Warga diharapkan hanya melakukan perjalanan penting dan mendesak, untuk menghindari penumpukan di pusat kegiatan atau keramaian.

entry.title: Cette ‘strawberry dress’ envoûte les réseaux sociaux

link.title: Cette ‘strawberry dress’ envoûte les réseaux sociaux

entry.content: Depuis fin juillet, une robe a conquis le cœur des internautes sur la toile : la “strawberry dress”. Difficile de la rater, elle est partout sur les réseaux sociaux. Les photos de femmes la portant fièrement se multiplient.
entry.summary: Depuis fin juillet, une robe a conquis le cœur des internautes sur la toile : la “strawberry dress”. Difficile de la rater, elle est partout sur les réseaux sociaux. Les photos de femmes la portant fièrement se multiplient.

entry.title: Aydın’da bilim dünyasını heyecanlandıran keşif

link.title: Aydın’da bilim dünyasını heyecanlandıran keşif

entry.content:
Aydın’ın Karpuzlu ilçesinde bulunan Alinda Antik Kenti yakınlarında yeni bir oda mezar keşfi yapıldı. Nekropol alanı dışında keşfedilen mezar, bölgede içerisinde yazıt bulunan ilk oda mezar olma özelliğiyle de bilim dünyasını heyecanlandırdı.
Geçmişinde birçok medeniyete ev sahipliği yapan ve il genelinde 23 antik kent ve örenyerleri bulunan Aydın’da, yeni bir keşif daha yapıldı. Karpuzlu ilçesinde bulunan ve Karya dönemine ait Alinda Antik Kenti’nde gerçekleştirilen arkeolojik yüzey araştırmalarında yeni bir oda mezar keşfedildi. Kentin nekropol alanı dışında kalan bir bölgede bulunan mezar, arkeologları heyecanlandırırken bölgede içerisinde yazıt bulunan ilk mezar olma özelliğiyle de büyük önem taşıyor.
Aydın Müze Müdürlüğü tarafından yapılan kurtarma kazıları sonrasında bölgenin sit alanı ilan edilmesi için çalışmalar başlatılırken, keşif yerini ziyaret eden Aydın İl Kültür ve Turizm Müdürü Doç. Dr. Mehmet Umut Tuncer, keşfin Aydın için çok önemli ve sevindiren bir gelişme olduğunu belirtti. Oda mezarın nekropol alanının dışında kalan bir bölgede tespit edildiğini ifade eden Aydın İl Kültür ve Turizm Müdürü Doç. Dr. Mehmet Umut Tuncer; “Karya Medeniyeti’nin izlerinin bulunduğu Alinda bölgemizde şu an için kazı çalışmaları yapılmıyor. Burada uzman ekiplerimiz ile birlikte yüzey araştırmaları gerçekleştiriliyor. Bu araştırmalar çerçevesinde sit alanımızın dışında bir oda mezar keşfi yapıldı. Burası normalde nekropol alanı değil. İlk defa bu bölgede bir mezar keşfi yaptık, normalde beklediğimiz bir şey değildi ve bizi de heyecanlandırdı. Bu kapsamda bölgede bir kurtarma çalışması ve bölgenin acilen kazı noktasına dönüştürülmesi için çalışmalara başladık. Söz konusu alanda daha önce mezar tespiti olmaması bizlere Alinda Antik Kenti nekropolünün çok farklı alanlara da yayıldığını göstermektedir. Bu yazıtlı mezar, en kısa zamanda bilim dünyasına kazandırılacaktır” dedi. Yapılan temizleme çalışmaları sonrasında mezarın MÖ 4. yüzyılda yapıldığı tahmin edilirken, MS 2. yüzyıla kadar kullanıldığının tespit edildiğini ifade eden Alinda Antik Kenti Arkeolojik Yüzey Araştırmaları Başkanı Arkeolog Doç. Dr. Murat Çekilmez ise; “Burada arkeolojik yüzey araştırmalarına başladığımızda bu bölgedeki parsellerde neler bulabiliriz, hangi yapılar var, onları tespit etmeye çalıştık ve bu mezarı keşfettik. Mezarın içerisine girdiğimizde bir yazıt bulduk ve yeni bir keşif olduğunu anladık. Burası bizim için çok önemli bir mezar, çünkü Alinde Antik Kenti’nde ilk defa yazıtlı bir mezar keşfettik. İlk defa bir oda mezarın içerisinde yazıt var ve mezarın Thyion oğlu Kresidemos adına yapıldığı öğrendik. Aydın Müzesi tarafından yapılan temizlik çalışmalarında antik çağdan günümüze kadar bu mezarın defineciler tarafından soyulmuş olduğunu tespit ettik. Yaptığımız çalışmalarda mezar içerisinde 1 adet kandil, 2 adet Roma dönemine ait bronz sikke ve çok sayıda seramik parçası bulduk. Böyle yeni ve önemli bir mezar bulmamız açısından sevinçliyiz” dedi.
entry.summary: Aydın’ın Karpuzlu ilçesinde bulunan Alinda Antik Kenti yakınlarında yeni bir oda mezar keşfi yapıldı. Nekropol alanı dışında keşfedilen mezar, bölgede içerisinde yazıt bulunan ilk oda mezar olma özelliğiyle de bilim dünyasını heyecanlandırdı. Geçmişinde birçok medeniyete ev sahipliği yapan ve il genelinde 23 antik kent ve örenyerleri bulunan Aydın’da, yeni bir keşif daha yapıldı. Karpuzlu ilçesinde bulunan ve Karya dönemine ait Alinda Antik Kenti’nde gerçekleştirilen arkeolojik yüzey araştırmalarında yeni bir oda mezar keşfedildi. Kentin nekropol alanı dışında kalan bir bölgede bulunan mezar, arkeologları heyecanlandırırken bölgede içerisinde yazıt bulunan ilk mezar olma özelliğiyle de büyük önem taşıyor. Aydın Müze Müdürlüğü tarafından yapılan kurtarma kazıları sonrasında bölgenin sit alanı ilan edilmesi için çalışmalar başlatılırken, keşif yerini ziyaret eden Aydın İl Kültür ve Turizm Müdürü Doç. Dr. Mehmet Umut Tuncer, keşfin Aydın için çok önemli ve sevindiren bir gelişme olduğunu belirtti. Oda mezarın nekropol alanının dışında kalan bir bölgede tespit edildiğini ifade eden Aydın İl Kültür ve Turizm Müdürü Doç. Dr. Mehmet Umut Tuncer; “Karya Medeniyeti’nin izlerinin bulunduğu Alinda bölgemizde şu an için kazı çalışmaları yapılmıyor. Burada uzman ekiplerimiz ile birlikte yüzey araştırmaları gerçekleştiriliyor. Bu araştırmalar çerçevesinde sit alanımızın dışında bir oda mezar keşfi yapıldı. Burası normalde nekropol alanı değil. İlk defa bu bölgede bir mezar keşfi yaptık, normalde beklediğimiz bir şey değildi ve bizi de heyecanlandırdı. Bu kapsamda bölgede bir kurtarma çalışması ve bölgenin acilen kazı noktasına dönüştürülmesi için çalışmalara başladık. Söz konusu alanda daha önce mezar tespiti olmaması bizlere Alinda Antik Kenti nekropolünün çok farklı alanlara da yayıldığını göstermektedir. Bu yazıtlı mezar, en kısa zamanda bilim dünyasına kazandırılacaktır” dedi. Yapılan temizleme çalışmaları sonrasında mezarın MÖ 4. yüzyılda yapıldığı tahmin edilirken, MS 2. yüzyıla kadar kullanıldığının tespit edildiğini ifade eden Alinda Antik Kenti Arkeolojik Yüzey Araştırmaları Başkanı Arkeolog Doç. Dr. Murat Çekilmez ise; “Burada arkeolojik yüzey araştırmalarına başladığımızda bu bölgedeki parsellerde neler bulabiliriz, hangi yapılar var, onları tespit etmeye çalıştık ve bu mezarı keşfettik. Mezarın içerisine girdiğimizde bir yazıt bulduk ve yeni bir keşif olduğunu anladık. Burası bizim için çok önemli bir mezar, çünkü Alinde Antik Kenti’nde ilk defa yazıtlı bir mezar keşfettik. İlk defa bir oda mezarın içerisinde yazıt var ve mezarın Thyion oğlu Kresidemos adına yapıldığı öğrendik. Aydın Müzesi tarafından yapılan temizlik çalışmalarında antik çağdan günümüze kadar bu mezarın defineciler tarafından soyulmuş olduğunu tespit ettik. Yaptığımız çalışmalarda mezar içerisinde 1 adet kandil, 2 adet Roma dönemine ait bronz sikke ve çok sayıda seramik parçası bulduk. Böyle yeni ve önemli bir mezar bulmamız açısından sevinçliyiz” dedi.

entry.title: PM Cares Fund पर आया Supreme Court का Verdict, BJP ने Rahul Gandhi को घेरा वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: PM Cares Fund पर आया Supreme Court का Verdict, BJP ने Rahul Gandhi को घेरा वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
The petition filed for the PM Cares Fund was heard in the Supreme Court. After the hearing, the Supreme Court has rejected the demand to transfer PM Cares Fund to NDRF. The Supreme Court dismissed the petition against PM Cares and said that the NDRF Corona formed in November 2019 is sufficient to deal with the crisis. There is no need to separate any new action plans and minimum standards. The Supreme Court’s decision on PM Cares Fund has been welcomed by BJP and has strongly attacked Rahul Gandhi. And big news of the day.
पीएम केअर्स फंड को लेकर दाखिल याचिका पर सुप्रीम कोर्ट में सुनवाई हुई. सुनवाई के बाद सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने पीएम केअर्स फंड को NDRF में ट्रांसफर करने की मांग खारिज कर दी है. सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने पीएम केअर्स के खिलाफ याचिका खारिज करते हुए कहा कि नवंबर 2019 में बनाई गई NDRF कोरोना संकट से निपटने के लिए पर्याप्त है. किसी नए एक्शन प्लान और न्यूनतम मानकों को अलग करने की आवश्यकता नहीं है. पीएम केअर्स फंड पर सुप्रीम कोर्ट के फैसले का बीजेपी ने स्वागत किया है और राहुल गांधी पर जोरदार हमला किया है. और दिनभर की बड़ी खबरें.
#TopNews #BigNews #OneindiaHindi
entry.summary: The petition filed for the PM Cares Fund was heard in the Supreme Court. After the hearing, the Supreme Court has rejected the demand to transfer PM Cares Fund to NDRF. The Supreme Court dismissed the petition against PM Cares and said that the NDRF Corona formed in November 2019 is sufficient to deal with the crisis. There is no need to separate any new action plans and minimum standards. The Supreme Court’s decision on PM Cares Fund has been welcomed by BJP and has strongly attacked Rahul Gandhi. And big news of the day. पीएम केअर्स फंड को लेकर दाखिल याचिका पर सुप्रीम कोर्ट में सुनवाई हुई. सुनवाई के बाद सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने पीएम केअर्स फंड को NDRF में ट्रांसफर करने की मांग खारिज कर दी है. सुप्रीम कोर्ट ने पीएम केअर्स के खिलाफ याचिका खारिज करते हुए कहा कि नवंबर 2019 में बनाई गई NDRF कोरोना संकट से निपटने के लिए पर्याप्त है. किसी नए एक्शन प्लान और न्यूनतम मानकों को अलग करने की आवश्यकता नहीं है. पीएम केअर्स फंड पर सुप्रीम कोर्ट के फैसले का बीजेपी ने स्वागत किया है और राहुल गांधी पर जोरदार हमला किया है. और दिनभर की बड़ी खबरें. #TopNews #BigNews #OneindiaHindi

entry.title: B-Hunter: la Belgique à la pointe en termes de drones militaires en 2023 (Major Frédéric Frezin)

link.title: B-Hunter: la Belgique à la pointe en termes de drones militaires en 2023 (Major Frédéric Frezin)

entry.content:

entry.title: Study Banding Saat Pandemi DPRD Kota Ambon Abaikan Etika

link.title: Study Banding Saat Pandemi DPRD Kota Ambon Abaikan Etika

entry.content:
AMBON,KOMPAS.TV-Kantor DPRD Kota Ambon terlihat sepi lantaran puluhan anggota DPRD Kota Ambon sedang melakukan study banding ke wilayah Jawa Barat untuk belajar pertanggung jawaban program refocusing selama pendemi covid-19.
Kunjungan kerja para anggota DPRD Kota Ambon ini tengah menjadi sorotan public, disaat upaya semua pihak sedang gencar-gencarnya memutus penyebaran wabah corona di Kota Ambon mereka memilih perjalanan dinas ke daerah zona merah.
Wali kota Ambon Richard Louhenapessy saat ditanyakan awak media, mengaku mengetahui keberangkatan para anggota DPRD ini namun substasi study banding bagi kepentingan rakyat, DPRD-lah yang lebih tahu.
Sebelumnya ada salasatu anggota DPRD Provinsi Maluku yang dinyatakan positif covid-19 bersama dua orang staf sekretariat setelah pulang study banding dari Jakarta pertengahan juli lalu.
entry.summary: AMBON,KOMPAS.TV-Kantor DPRD Kota Ambon terlihat sepi lantaran puluhan anggota DPRD Kota Ambon sedang melakukan study banding ke wilayah Jawa Barat untuk belajar pertanggung jawaban program refocusing selama pendemi covid-19. Kunjungan kerja para anggota DPRD Kota Ambon ini tengah menjadi sorotan public, disaat upaya semua pihak sedang gencar-gencarnya memutus penyebaran wabah corona di Kota Ambon mereka memilih perjalanan dinas ke daerah zona merah. Wali kota Ambon Richard Louhenapessy saat ditanyakan awak media, mengaku mengetahui keberangkatan para anggota DPRD ini namun substasi study banding bagi kepentingan rakyat, DPRD-lah yang lebih tahu. Sebelumnya ada salasatu anggota DPRD Provinsi Maluku yang dinyatakan positif covid-19 bersama dua orang staf sekretariat setelah pulang study banding dari Jakarta pertengahan juli lalu.

entry.title: Lotus seed pods - not for trypophobics!

link.title: Lotus seed pods - not for trypophobics!

entry.content: Seed Pods of Lotus plant, during the Indian monsoon. Trypophobics of the world unite against Trypophobia ! The term trypophobia (sometimes called repetitive pattern phobia) was coined in 2005, a combination of the Greek trypo (punching, drilling or boring holes) and phobia. It is not recognized in the American Psychiatric Association’s Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders. Thousands of people claim to be fearful of objects with small holes, such as beehives, ant holes, and lotus seed heads. Research is limited and Arnold Wilkins and Geoff Cole, who claim to be the first to scientifically investigate, believe the reaction to be based on a biological revulsion, rather than a learned cultural fear. Source - Wikipedia This footage is part of the professionally-shot stock footage archive of Wilderness Films India Ltd., the largest collection of imagery from South Asia. The Wilderness Films India collection comprises of thousands of hours of high quality broadcast imagery, mostly shot on HDCAM 1080i High Definition, HDV and Digital Betacam. Write to us for licensing this footage on a broadcast format, for use in your production! We pride ourselves in bringing the best of India and South Asia to the world… rupindang [at] gmail [dot] com and admin@wildfilmsindia.com.
entry.summary: Seed Pods of Lotus plant, during the Indian monsoon. Trypophobics of the world unite against Trypophobia ! The term trypophobia (sometimes called repetitive pattern phobia) was coined in 2005, a combination of the Greek trypo (punching, drilling or boring holes) and phobia. It is not recognized in the American Psychiatric Association’s Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders. Thousands of people claim to be fearful of objects with small holes, such as beehives, ant holes, and lotus seed heads. Research is limited and Arnold Wilkins and Geoff Cole, who claim to be the first to scientifically investigate, believe the reaction to be based on a biological revulsion, rather than a learned cultural fear. Source - Wikipedia This footage is part of the professionally-shot stock footage archive of Wilderness Films India Ltd., the largest collection of imagery from South Asia. The Wilderness Films India collection comprises of thousands of hours of high quality broadcast imagery, mostly shot on HDCAM 1080i High Definition, HDV and Digital Betacam. Write to us for licensing this footage on a broadcast format, for use in your production! We pride ourselves in bringing the best of India and South Asia to the world… rupindang [at] gmail [dot] com and admin@wildfilmsindia.com.

entry.title: AP CM Jagan, CM KCR, Pawan Kalyan’s #IndependenceDay2020 Celebrations Oneindia Telugu

link.title: AP CM Jagan, CM KCR, Pawan Kalyan’s #IndependenceDay2020 Celebrations Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
Andhra pradesh chief minister ys jagan mohan reddy hoisted national flag at 74th independence day celebrations in Indira Gandhi Municipal Stadium, vijayawada. Meanwhile Telangana cm kcr also hoisted the flag and wishes party leaders and people.Janasena party chief pawan kalyan participated in 74th independece day celerbations in hyderabad.
#IndependenceDay2020
#ysjaganunfurlsnationalflag
#74thindependencedaycelebrations
#NarendraModihoistedtricolour
#Pawankalyanoistedflag
#KCR
#chandrababunaidu
#Independent
#74thIndependenceDay
#August15th
#India
#telugustates
#IndiraGandhiMunicipalStadium
ఇందిరాగాంధీ మున్సిపల్ కార్పోరేషన్ స్టేడియంలో ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ ప్రభుత్వం తరఫున 74వ స్వాతంత్ర దినోత్సవ కార్యక్రమం అట్టహాసంగా సాగుతోంది. వర్షపు జల్లుల్లోనే సీఎం జగన్ స్టేడియంలో ఏర్పాటు చేసిన జాతీయ జెండాను ఆవిష్కరించారు. అనంతరం సాయుధ దళాల నుండి గౌరవ వందనం స్వీకరించారు..
entry.summary: Andhra pradesh chief minister ys jagan mohan reddy hoisted national flag at 74th independence day celebrations in Indira Gandhi Municipal Stadium, vijayawada. Meanwhile Telangana cm kcr also hoisted the flag and wishes party leaders and people.Janasena party chief pawan kalyan participated in 74th independece day celerbations in hyderabad. #IndependenceDay2020 #ysjaganunfurlsnationalflag #74thindependencedaycelebrations #NarendraModihoistedtricolour #Pawankalyanoistedflag #KCR #chandrababunaidu #Independent #74thIndependenceDay #August15th #India #telugustates #IndiraGandhiMunicipalStadium ఇందిరాగాంధీ మున్సిపల్ కార్పోరేషన్ స్టేడియంలో ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ ప్రభుత్వం తరఫున 74వ స్వాతంత్ర దినోత్సవ కార్యక్రమం అట్టహాసంగా సాగుతోంది. వర్షపు జల్లుల్లోనే సీఎం జగన్ స్టేడియంలో ఏర్పాటు చేసిన జాతీయ జెండాను ఆవిష్కరించారు. అనంతరం సాయుధ దళాల నుండి గౌరవ వందనం స్వీకరించారు..

entry.title: India-China Tension: Ladakh में अड़े चीन को आर्थिक झटका देने की तैयारी में भारत ! वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: India-China Tension: Ladakh में अड़े चीन को आर्थिक झटका देने की तैयारी में भारत ! वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
With the People’s Liberation Army (PLA) still holding forward positions on Pangong Tso and Gogra-Hot Springs area of Ladakh and showing no signs of a promised de-escalation, the Narendra Modi government is contemplating further action against China on economic front to drive home the message that India means business.
लद्दाख सीमा पर चीनी सेना का अड़ियल रवैया जारी है। चीन की पीपुल्स लिबरेशन आर्मी लद्दाख के पैंगोंग त्सो और गोगरा-हॉट स्प्रिंग्स क्षेत्र पर अब भी फॉरवर्ड पोजिशन पर काबिज है और वादे के मुताबिक ड्रैगन डी-एस्केलेशन के कोई संकेत नहीं दे रहा है। ऐसी स्थिति में चीन को सबक सिखाने और उसकी हेकड़ी तोड़ने के लिए नरेंद्र मोदी सरकार आर्थिक मोर्चे पर एक और एक्शन लेने की योजना बना रही है। इस मामले शीर्ष चीन अध्ययन समूह ने सोमवार को लद्दाख में जमीन पर चीनी सेना की कार्रवाई और तिब्बत के कब्जे वाले अक्साई चीन क्षेत्र में उसकी सैन्य तैयारी पर चर्चा की।
#IndiaChinaStandoff #India #China #OneindiaHindi
entry.summary: With the People’s Liberation Army (PLA) still holding forward positions on Pangong Tso and Gogra-Hot Springs area of Ladakh and showing no signs of a promised de-escalation, the Narendra Modi government is contemplating further action against China on economic front to drive home the message that India means business. लद्दाख सीमा पर चीनी सेना का अड़ियल रवैया जारी है। चीन की पीपुल्स लिबरेशन आर्मी लद्दाख के पैंगोंग त्सो और गोगरा-हॉट स्प्रिंग्स क्षेत्र पर अब भी फॉरवर्ड पोजिशन पर काबिज है और वादे के मुताबिक ड्रैगन डी-एस्केलेशन के कोई संकेत नहीं दे रहा है। ऐसी स्थिति में चीन को सबक सिखाने और उसकी हेकड़ी तोड़ने के लिए नरेंद्र मोदी सरकार आर्थिक मोर्चे पर एक और एक्शन लेने की योजना बना रही है। इस मामले शीर्ष चीन अध्ययन समूह ने सोमवार को लद्दाख में जमीन पर चीनी सेना की कार्रवाई और तिब्बत के कब्जे वाले अक्साई चीन क्षेत्र में उसकी सैन्य तैयारी पर चर्चा की। #IndiaChinaStandoff #India #China #OneindiaHindi

entry.title: Bipasha Basu- ‘I Am A Mess Before Shooting Intimate Scenes, They Terrify Me’ _ SpotboyE

link.title: Bipasha Basu- ‘I Am A Mess Before Shooting Intimate Scenes, They Terrify Me’ _ SpotboyE

entry.content: #BipashaBasu is all set to return to entertain fans with her thriller series, #Dangerous, co-starring her husband, #KaranSinghGrover. We spoke to the couple about their new project and more. Watch the video
entry.summary: #BipashaBasu is all set to return to entertain fans with her thriller series, #Dangerous, co-starring her husband, #KaranSinghGrover. We spoke to the couple about their new project and more. Watch the video

entry.title: Rohan Mehra Is Super Excited To Reunite With Avneet Kaur For A Music Video

link.title: Rohan Mehra Is Super Excited To Reunite With Avneet Kaur For A Music Video

entry.content: Rohan Mehra who debuted as Duggu in Ye Rishta Kya Kehelata Hai has now indeed grown up to be one of the most desirable men in the Bollywood vicinity. His performance as Ibrahim in an ALT Balaji series ‘Class of 2020’ has indeed received a lot of appreciation from his fans. His impeccable acting skill makes his character much more relatable to today’s generation and has helped in giving out a message to be a better person. Rohan recently admitted that after the success of his and Avneet Kaur’s feature in Anand Bajpai’s song Tarse ye Naina, the duo is soon to be featured in a new romantic song which will be shot in Chandigarh. When asked Rohan more about this, he mentioned “Avneet and I have been very good friends, and working with her in Dubai shooting for a music video was indeed a fun experience, and I’m super psyched to be working with her again. I am also excited to be shooting in the exotic locations of Chandigarh and I’m sure it truly will be a visually pleasing experience for our audience as well. What makes this project special is that it will be shot under the banner of Desi Music Factory.”
entry.summary: Rohan Mehra who debuted as Duggu in Ye Rishta Kya Kehelata Hai has now indeed grown up to be one of the most desirable men in the Bollywood vicinity. His performance as Ibrahim in an ALT Balaji series ‘Class of 2020’ has indeed received a lot of appreciation from his fans. His impeccable acting skill makes his character much more relatable to today’s generation and has helped in giving out a message to be a better person. Rohan recently admitted that after the success of his and Avneet Kaur’s feature in Anand Bajpai’s song Tarse ye Naina, the duo is soon to be featured in a new romantic song which will be shot in Chandigarh. When asked Rohan more about this, he mentioned “Avneet and I have been very good friends, and working with her in Dubai shooting for a music video was indeed a fun experience, and I’m super psyched to be working with her again. I am also excited to be shooting in the exotic locations of Chandigarh and I’m sure it truly will be a visually pleasing experience for our audience as well. What makes this project special is that it will be shot under the banner of Desi Music Factory.”

entry.title: BCCI is willing to host a farewell match for former India captain MS Dhoni वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: BCCI is willing to host a farewell match for former India captain MS Dhoni वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
BCCI is willing to host a farewell match for former India captain MS Dhoni, who recently announced his retirement from international cricket.Speaking to IANS, a senior BCCI official said the board will speak to Dhoni, during the upcoming edition of the Indian Premier League, and plan accordingly.
भारतीय क्रिकेट टीम के पूर्व कप्तान महेंद्र सिंह धौनी ने 15 अगस्त को अपने इंटरनेशनल करियर से संन्यास लेने का फैसला कर लिया। सोशल मीडिया पर एक वीडियो पोस्ट कर उन्होंने अपने संन्यास की घोषणा की। बिना विदाई मैच खेले भारत के इस महान कप्तान का इंटरनेशनल क्रिकेट छोड़ना लोगों को रास नहीं आया। झारखंड के मुख्यमंत्री हेमंत सोरेन ने बीसीसीआई से धौनी के लिए एक विदाई मैच आयोजन करने की गुजारिश की है, अब इस मामले पर बीसीसीआई का बयान सामने आया है।
#MSDhoni #BCCI #farewellmatch
entry.summary: BCCI is willing to host a farewell match for former India captain MS Dhoni, who recently announced his retirement from international cricket.Speaking to IANS, a senior BCCI official said the board will speak to Dhoni, during the upcoming edition of the Indian Premier League, and plan accordingly. भारतीय क्रिकेट टीम के पूर्व कप्तान महेंद्र सिंह धौनी ने 15 अगस्त को अपने इंटरनेशनल करियर से संन्यास लेने का फैसला कर लिया। सोशल मीडिया पर एक वीडियो पोस्ट कर उन्होंने अपने संन्यास की घोषणा की। बिना विदाई मैच खेले भारत के इस महान कप्तान का इंटरनेशनल क्रिकेट छोड़ना लोगों को रास नहीं आया। झारखंड के मुख्यमंत्री हेमंत सोरेन ने बीसीसीआई से धौनी के लिए एक विदाई मैच आयोजन करने की गुजारिश की है, अब इस मामले पर बीसीसीआई का बयान सामने आया है। #MSDhoni #BCCI #farewellmatch

entry.title: Critérium du Dauphiné 2020 - Guillaume Martin sauve la 3e place : ‘Ce podium est une super performance’

link.title: Critérium du Dauphiné 2020 - Guillaume Martin sauve la 3e place : ‘Ce podium est une super performance’

entry.content: Au terme d’une dernière étape folle, Guillaume Martin (Cofidis) a réussi à sauver sa place sur le podium final. Le Français a souffert, mais il termine finalement 3e de ce Critérium du Dauphiné derrière le vainqueur Daniel Martinez (EF Pro Cycling) et Thibaut Pinot (Groupama-FDJ)
entry.summary: Au terme d’une dernière étape folle, Guillaume Martin (Cofidis) a réussi à sauver sa place sur le podium final. Le Français a souffert, mais il termine finalement 3e de ce Critérium du Dauphiné derrière le vainqueur Daniel Martinez (EF Pro Cycling) et Thibaut Pinot (Groupama-FDJ)

entry.title: இந்திரா காந்தி குடும்பத்தை சேராத ஒருவர் காங்கிரஸ் தலைவராக வரட்டும் - பிரியங்கா காந்தி

link.title: இந்திரா காந்தி குடும்பத்தை சேராத ஒருவர் காங்கிரஸ் தலைவராக வரட்டும் - பிரியங்கா காந்தி

entry.content:
#Congress #PriyankaGandhi
காங்கிரஸ் கட்சிக்கு இந்திரா காந்தி குடும்பத்தைச் சேராத ஒருவர்தான் தலைவராக வேண்டும் என்று அக்கட்சியின் பொதுச்செயலாளர் பிரியங்கா காந்தி வலியுறுத்தியுள்ளார்.
I will suppor to Non Gandhi should be Congress president post says priyanka gandhi
entry.summary: #Congress #PriyankaGandhi காங்கிரஸ் கட்சிக்கு இந்திரா காந்தி குடும்பத்தைச் சேராத ஒருவர்தான் தலைவராக வேண்டும் என்று அக்கட்சியின் பொதுச்செயலாளர் பிரியங்கா காந்தி வலியுறுத்தியுள்ளார். I will suppor to Non Gandhi should be Congress president post says priyanka gandhi

entry.title: NEWS: Green Packet and Tencent Cloud in significant collaboration

link.title: NEWS: Green Packet and Tencent Cloud in significant collaboration

entry.content: Green Packet has teamed up with Tencent Cloud to set up a joint Internet data centre in Malaysia, a partnership that allows both to leverage on each other’s strengths.
entry.summary: Green Packet has teamed up with Tencent Cloud to set up a joint Internet data centre in Malaysia, a partnership that allows both to leverage on each other’s strengths.

entry.title: Des idées d’attaquants libres ou en prêts pour Villas-Boas

link.title: Des idées d’attaquants libres ou en prêts pour Villas-Boas

entry.content: Si l’OM ne parvient pas à vendre des joueurs, il faudra se résoudre à une fin de mercato morose, où le poste d’avant-centre est devenu une priorité. Pour l’instant avec des moyens extrêmement limités. Voici quelques idées de joueurs libres ou de prêts pour l’OM.
entry.summary: Si l’OM ne parvient pas à vendre des joueurs, il faudra se résoudre à une fin de mercato morose, où le poste d’avant-centre est devenu une priorité. Pour l’instant avec des moyens extrêmement limités. Voici quelques idées de joueurs libres ou de prêts pour l’OM.

entry.title: Pesona Pulau Sabu di Nusa Tenggara Timur

link.title: Pesona Pulau Sabu di Nusa Tenggara Timur

entry.content:
Pulau Sabu berada di Nusa Tenggara Timur memiliki keindahan alam yang begitu eksotis. Ragam budaya yang unik dan khas, menjadi daya tarik wisatawan lokal maupun mancanegara berdatangan kesana.
Pulau Sabu menjadi sorotan, setelah Presiden Jokowi yang pada harı Jumat (14/08/2020) kemarin menghadiri SIdang Tahunan MPR, mengenakan baju adat dari terdepan di ujung selatan Indonesia. Pesona pullu Sabu tak kalan dnegan tempat wisata lainnya yang ada di Indonesia.
Seperti apa pesona keindahan pullu tersebut? Selengkapnya dalam video di atas
Creative/Video Editor : Iramdani/ Yulita Futty Hapsari
#Pulausabu #NTT #KelabbaMaja
==================================
Homepage:
Facebook Fan Page:
Instagram:
Twitter:
entry.summary: Pulau Sabu berada di Nusa Tenggara Timur memiliki keindahan alam yang begitu eksotis. Ragam budaya yang unik dan khas, menjadi daya tarik wisatawan lokal maupun mancanegara berdatangan kesana. Pulau Sabu menjadi sorotan, setelah Presiden Jokowi yang pada harı Jumat (14/08/2020) kemarin menghadiri SIdang Tahunan MPR, mengenakan baju adat dari terdepan di ujung selatan Indonesia. Pesona pullu Sabu tak kalan dnegan tempat wisata lainnya yang ada di Indonesia. Seperti apa pesona keindahan pullu tersebut? Selengkapnya dalam video di atas Creative/Video Editor : Iramdani/ Yulita Futty Hapsari #Pulausabu #NTT #KelabbaMaja ================================== Homepage: Facebook Fan Page: Instagram: Twitter:

entry.title: 19th Amendment Ratified

link.title: 19th Amendment Ratified

entry.content: The 19th Amendment to the U.S. Constitution, ratified on August 18, 1920, granted American women the right to vote, a right known as women’s suffrage, ending almost a century of protest.
entry.summary: The 19th Amendment to the U.S. Constitution, ratified on August 18, 1920, granted American women the right to vote, a right known as women’s suffrage, ending almost a century of protest.

entry.title: Barca in talks with Koeman after sacking Setien - club source

link.title: Barca in talks with Koeman after sacking Setien - club source

entry.content: BARCELONA (Reuters) - Barcelona are negotiating a deal to appoint Netherlands coach Ronald Koeman as the successor to Quique Setien, a club source said on Tuesday, as the Catalans look to rebuild after their 8-2 thrashing by Bayern Munich in the Champions League last week. Koeman is dearly loved at Barca for his playing career in Johan Cruyff’s hugely successful side known as the ‘Dream Team’ and for scoring the goal that delivered the club’s first ever European Cup in 1992. The defender later became the club’s assistant coach before embarking on an eventful career as a head coach, managing Dutch sides Ajax Amsterdam, PSV Eindhoven and Feyenoord plus Premier League sides Southampton and Everton and La Liga’s Valencia. Spanish and Dutch media also said Barca were in talks with Koeman, who led the Netherlands to qualification for the European Championships, which have been postponed due to the COVID-19 pandemic.  (Reporting by Richard Martin; Editing by Hugh Lawson) …
entry.summary: BARCELONA (Reuters) - Barcelona are negotiating a deal to appoint Netherlands coach Ronald Koeman as the successor to Quique Setien, a club source said on Tuesday, as the Catalans look to rebuild after their 8-2 thrashing by Bayern Munich in the Champions League last week. Koeman is dearly loved at Barca for his playing career in Johan Cruyff’s hugely successful side known as the ‘Dream Team’ and for scoring the goal that delivered the club’s first ever European Cup in 1992. The defender later became the club’s assistant coach before embarking on an eventful career as a head coach, managing Dutch sides Ajax Amsterdam, PSV Eindhoven and Feyenoord plus Premier League sides Southampton and Everton and La Liga’s Valencia. Spanish and Dutch media also said Barca were in talks with Koeman, who led the Netherlands to qualification for the European Championships, which have been postponed due to the COVID-19 pandemic. (Reporting by Richard Martin; Editing by Hugh Lawson) …

entry.title: NEYMAR E RAPHAELLA BONALDI: INFLUENCER DÁ DETALHES DE POSSÍVEL AFFAIR E JOGADOR DÁ UNFOLLOW!

link.title: NEYMAR E RAPHAELLA BONALDI: INFLUENCER DÁ DETALHES DE POSSÍVEL AFFAIR E JOGADOR DÁ UNFOLLOW!

entry.content:
#NeymarJr se envolveu numa polêmica com uma influencer hoje, 18. Segundo #RaphaellaBonaldi, o jogador tinha prometido fazer um gol para ela na partida de hoje. Porém, com o vazamento do vídeo, parece que o flerte foi por água abaixo!
#PSG #Tattoo
entry.summary: #NeymarJr se envolveu numa polêmica com uma influencer hoje, 18. Segundo #RaphaellaBonaldi, o jogador tinha prometido fazer um gol para ela na partida de hoje. Porém, com o vazamento do vídeo, parece que o flerte foi por água abaixo! #PSG #Tattoo

entry.title: Berpacu dengan Waktu Uji Klinis Vaksin Corona - NEWS OR HOAX (Bag1)

link.title: Berpacu dengan Waktu Uji Klinis Vaksin Corona - NEWS OR HOAX (Bag1)

entry.content:
KOMPAS.TV - Sejumlah negara dan perusahaan farmasi saat ini sedang beradu cepat mengembangkan kandidat vaksin covid-19.
Para ahli memperkirakan proses pengembangan vaksin corona paling cepat bisa selesai dalam 12 hingga 18 bulan ke depan. Dengan catatan proses pengembangan vaksin tidak terkendala masalah yang berarti.
Di dalam negeri, pemerintah indonesia menunjuk perusahaan farmasi pelat merah PT Biofarma untuk bekerja sama dengan sinovac biotech, perusahaan farmasi Tiongkok, dalam mengembangkan vaksin corona. Sinovac mengembangkan kandidat vaksin COVID-19 bernama Coronavac.
Berdasarkan laporan dari WHO, progres pengembangan vaksin ini sekarang telah memasuki uji klinis fase ketiga.
Proses tersebut dimulai bulan Juli lalu dan diperkirakan selesai pada Oktober 2020 nanti.
Apabila uji klinis fase ketiga ini lancar, produksi vaksin secara massal akan dilakukan pada Januari 2020 mendatang.
PT Biofarma menyatakan mampu memproduksi kurang lebih 100 juta vaksin, dan akan menambah kapasitas produksi hingga 250 juta.
Secara teori, vaksin yang efektif, mampu melawan virus. Namun, sampai uji coba fase tiga selesai, para ahli mengatakan belum ada yang tahu apakah vaksin itu efektif.
Karena itu, penelitian vaksin penangkal virus yang selama ini dilakukan masih harus dilanjutkan selama beberapa periode waktu, hingga ada perkembangan lebih lanjut.
entry.summary: KOMPAS.TV - Sejumlah negara dan perusahaan farmasi saat ini sedang beradu cepat mengembangkan kandidat vaksin covid-19. Para ahli memperkirakan proses pengembangan vaksin corona paling cepat bisa selesai dalam 12 hingga 18 bulan ke depan. Dengan catatan proses pengembangan vaksin tidak terkendala masalah yang berarti. Di dalam negeri, pemerintah indonesia menunjuk perusahaan farmasi pelat merah PT Biofarma untuk bekerja sama dengan sinovac biotech, perusahaan farmasi Tiongkok, dalam mengembangkan vaksin corona. Sinovac mengembangkan kandidat vaksin COVID-19 bernama Coronavac. Berdasarkan laporan dari WHO, progres pengembangan vaksin ini sekarang telah memasuki uji klinis fase ketiga. Proses tersebut dimulai bulan Juli lalu dan diperkirakan selesai pada Oktober 2020 nanti. Apabila uji klinis fase ketiga ini lancar, produksi vaksin secara massal akan dilakukan pada Januari 2020 mendatang. PT Biofarma menyatakan mampu memproduksi kurang lebih 100 juta vaksin, dan akan menambah kapasitas produksi hingga 250 juta. Secara teori, vaksin yang efektif, mampu melawan virus. Namun, sampai uji coba fase tiga selesai, para ahli mengatakan belum ada yang tahu apakah vaksin itu efektif. Karena itu, penelitian vaksin penangkal virus yang selama ini dilakukan masih harus dilanjutkan selama beberapa periode waktu, hingga ada perkembangan lebih lanjut.

entry.title: CPL 2020 players who are also playing in IPL 2020 OneIndia Tamil

link.title: CPL 2020 players who are also playing in IPL 2020 OneIndia Tamil

entry.content:
#ipl
#iplt20
#cpl2020
CPL 2020 : Here is the complete list of CPL players who are also playing in IPL 2020. Three CSK players are playing in CPL 2020.
கரீபியன் பிரீமியர் லீக் டி20 தொடர் ஆகஸ்ட் 18 முதல் செப்டம்பர் 10 வரை நடைபெற உள்ளது. கரீபியன் பிரீமியர் லீக் தொடரில் ஆட உள்ள அந்த ஐபிஎல் வீரர்களின் பட்டியல்
entry.summary: #ipl #iplt20 #cpl2020 CPL 2020 : Here is the complete list of CPL players who are also playing in IPL 2020. Three CSK players are playing in CPL 2020. கரீபியன் பிரீமியர் லீக் டி20 தொடர் ஆகஸ்ட் 18 முதல் செப்டம்பர் 10 வரை நடைபெற உள்ளது. கரீபியன் பிரீமியர் லீக் தொடரில் ஆட உள்ள அந்த ஐபிஎல் வீரர்களின் பட்டியல்
